tiktok.caption: You're paying $270 to file taxes every year — and the IRS literally offers it free. Here's the scam nobody talks about.

youtube_short.title: You're Paying $270 to File Taxes (When It's Free)
title_alternatives: The Tax Filing Scam 60 Million Americans Fall For
IRS Free File: The Secret They Don't Want You to Know
youtube_short.description: Every year, 60 million Americans hand over $270 to file their taxes — even though the IRS has offered completely free filing for over 20 years. The tax prep industry spent $6.6 million lobbying to keep you in the dark. If you earned under $79,000 last year, you qualify for IRS Free File — that's 70% of all taxpayers. That $270 invested every year for 30 years at 7% is $21,600 your preparer quietly stole from your future. Search 'IRS Free File' right now and stop paying for something that's literally free. #taxes #personalfinance #moneytips #savemoney #irs #taxseason

hook_line: You're paying $270 for something the IRS gives you FREE
